feed.title: Indogermanische Forschungen...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Indogermanische Forschungen... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Contents

entry.title: The adjective class in R̥g-Vedic Sanskrit and Proto-Indo-European
entry.summary: Authors: Luca Alfieri, Pat Snidvongs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/if-2026-0003 Pages: Page range: 41-94

entry.title: Cultural lexical borrowings in Proto-Slavic from a local variety of the West European Substrate
entry.summary: Authors: Alexei S. Kassian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/if-2026-0004 Pages: Page range: 95-120

entry.title: The Old Church Slavic conditional in comparative syntactic perspective
The relative age of the Indo‑European s‑aorist and the origin of its ablaut pattern
entry.summary: Authors: Alwin Kloekhorst DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/if-2026-0006 Pages: Page range: 179-230

entry.title: PGmc. *skōha- ‘shoe’ re-visited
entry.summary: Authors: Aurelijus Vijūnas DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/if-2026-0007 Pages: Page range: 231-242

entry.title: Hittite heu- : heaw- « pluie »

entry.title: Lycian lada ‘wife’

entry.title: Reconsidering the problem of Vedic ūrdhváand Avestan ərəδβa-, arəduuī-
